since_last: 45% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.96%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.90% · BTC -2.30% · Gold -0.61% · Nasdaq100 -2.21%. 45% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.96%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.96%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -9.00%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +5.42%, PINS +4.54%, SAP +2.84%, NOW +2.75%, OKLO +2.74%. Laggards: MU -9.00%, VRT -8.86%, TER -8.69%, LRCX -8.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.48% at $158.44
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
